title: Device Settings  - Custom Button - Teams Detected
scenario: Custom Button "Other Providers" option is greyed out and inaccessible when Microsoft Teams is connected on Falcon headsets
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Pair a supported Falcon headset (e.g., Voyager Focus 2) with the Android device.
3. Ensure the headset is also connected to a PC running Microsoft Teams.
4. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
5. Locate the Custom Button settings section.
6. Observe the two options displayed: "Microsoft Teams" (selected by default) and "Other Providers" (greyed out).
7. Read the message below the options: "Microsoft Teams is connected. Other Providers is not available when Microsoft Teams is connected."
8. Attempt to tap on the "Other Providers" option.
expected: The Custom Button UI should show \"Microsoft Teams\" selected by default and \"Other Providers\" greyed out with the informational message. Tapping \"Other Providers\" should do nothing as it is inaccessible.
